scoring_notes: Rows define hidden check intent. Convert each row to executable black-box test_code before candidate runs. Do not score model candidates against this draft.

items.description: Normalizes minimal graph workflow defaults.
items.cross_feature_contract: Spec defaults are public before scheduling or execution.

items.description: Rejects duplicate step ids and unknown dependencies atomically.
items.cross_feature_contract: Invalid specs never create durable workflow state.

items.description: Distinguishes graph mode dependencies from chain mode ordering.
items.cross_feature_contract: Execution order primitives are fixed before runner composition.

items.description: Validates fake action names and public action arguments.
items.cross_feature_contract: Runner receives only public normalized action records.

items.description: Computes due slots with catchup skip policy.
items.cross_feature_contract: Schedule primitive agrees with virtual-clock contract.
items.feature_pure_notes: Feature-pure: scheduler plus direct spec fixture.

items.description: Computes due slots with catchup latest policy.
items.cross_feature_contract: Latest catch-up is explicit before queue materialization.

items.description: Computes due slots with catchup all policy.
items.cross_feature_contract: All missed slots are materialized deterministically.

items.description: Applies overlap skip, latest, and all decisions.
items.cross_feature_contract: Overlap policy precedes run enqueue visibility.

items.description: Enqueues and claims queue item with owner lease metadata.
items.cross_feature_contract: Lease primitive is public before runner integration.

items.description: Rejects ack by non-owner worker and preserves lease state.
items.cross_feature_contract: Ownership errors do not corrupt queue projections.

items.description: Expires leases using virtual time and returns timeout records.
items.cross_feature_contract: Recovery can rely on lease timeout primitive.

items.description: Creates retry_wait decision before retry limit is exhausted.
items.cross_feature_contract: Retry row exists before queue re-enqueue.

items.description: Creates exhausted decision after retry limit is reached.
items.cross_feature_contract: Terminal failure primitive feeds status rollup.

items.description: Runs ok, fail, emit, and wait fake actions deterministically.
items.cross_feature_contract: Runner output shape feeds logs/history consistently.

items.description: Orders logs and events by recorded_at and sequence.
items.cross_feature_contract: Merged streams are deterministic across API and CLI.

items.description: Rolls up step attempt statuses into run status.
items.cross_feature_contract: Status projection primitive matches attempt records.

items.description: Reports next-runs from spec schedules and last schedule ledger.
items.cross_feature_contract: Next-run projection matches schedule primitive.

items.description: Classifies expired leases, due retries, and orphaned queue rows.
items.cross_feature_contract: Recovery categories are public before repair actions.

items.description: Rejects import into non-empty store atomically.
items.cross_feature_contract: Replay safety primitive protects integrated state.

items.description: Public errors serialize to deterministic JSON-compatible dictionaries.
items.cross_feature_contract: API and CLI expose equivalent error envelopes.

items.description: init and put-spec persist normalized workflow and status reports.
items.cross_feature_contract: API, spec store, and history projection agree.

items.description: CLI put-spec and API status produce equivalent JSON projections.
items.cross_feature_contract: CLI and API share public fact source.

items.description: tick materializes due scheduled run into queue and next-run report.
items.cross_feature_contract: Schedule ledger, queue, and next-run projection agree.
items.feature_pure_notes: Integration: scheduler plus queue plus API.

items.description: overlap skip leaves active run and records skipped due slot without duplicate queue item.
items.cross_feature_contract: Overlap, schedule ledger, queue, and history agree.

items.description: claim and complete successful item updates attempt, queue, logs, events, and status.
items.cross_feature_contract: Lease, runner, history, logs, and status agree.

items.description: fail step with retries records retry_wait, retry event, and due retry timestamp.
items.cross_feature_contract: Retry plan, history, and event stream agree.

items.description: due retry returns failed step to queue and preserves prior attempt history.
items.cross_feature_contract: Retry scanner, queue, and history agree.

items.description: cancel run removes queued visibility while retaining terminal history and event.
items.cross_feature_contract: Queue, history, and events agree after cancellation.

items.description: emit action output appears in step attempt, log stream, and history report.
items.cross_feature_contract: Runner output projects consistently.

items.description: recover expires stale lease and requeues work with recovery report.
items.cross_feature_contract: Recovery report, queue, and history agree.

items.description: export/import round trip preserves status, history, queue, logs, and next-runs.
items.cross_feature_contract: Replay preserves all public projections.

items.description: invalid complete by wrong worker does not change queue, attempt, logs, or status.
items.cross_feature_contract: Error atomicity spans public projections.

items.description: chain mode queues steps strictly in listed order after each success.
items.cross_feature_contract: Spec mode, queue, and history agree.

items.description: graph mode queues independent steps and then dependent step after prerequisites succeed.
items.cross_feature_contract: Dependency graph, queue, and attempt history agree.

items.description: CLI recover and API recovery report expose equivalent records.
items.cross_feature_contract: CLI/API report the same recovery fact source.

items.description: Graph workflow success keeps status, attempts, queue, logs, events, and history coherent.
items.cross_feature_contract: All public projections agree after a full successful workflow.
items.feature_pure_notes: System: multi-step workflow; ignore primitive parser roots if unit fails.

items.description: Failed step retries under virtual time and later succeeds with complete history.
items.cross_feature_contract: Retry, queue, events, logs, and status agree across attempts.

items.description: Exhausted retry fails run and leaves queue empty while preserving attempts and errors.
items.cross_feature_contract: Terminal failure projection agrees with retry history.

items.description: Downtime with catchup latest materializes one due run and correct next-run view.
items.cross_feature_contract: Schedule ledger, queue, run history, and next-run report agree.

items.description: Downtime with catchup all materializes every missed slot without duplicate slot ids.
items.cross_feature_contract: Schedule ledger and queued run records agree over multiple slots.

items.description: Overlap latest cancels older queued due run and keeps newest visible with audit event.
items.cross_feature_contract: Overlap, queue, history, and events agree.

items.description: Worker lease expires across restart and recovery requeues work without losing logs/history.
items.cross_feature_contract: Recovery, queue, history, logs, and status agree after restart.

items.description: Cancelling running workflow marks pending/running steps and queue items consistently.
items.cross_feature_contract: Cancellation propagates across queue, attempts, status, and events.

items.description: Export/import after mixed schedule, retry, and logs preserves every public projection.
items.cross_feature_contract: Replay preserves status, history, queue, next-runs, logs, events, recovery.

items.description: A workflow driven by CLI commands has the same final reports as API-driven workflow.
items.cross_feature_contract: CLI and API maintain same shared fact source.

items.description: Equivalent chain and graph workflows expose different legal queue sequences but same terminal output.
items.cross_feature_contract: Spec mode changes queue/history without breaking terminal projection.

items.description: wait action blocks dependent step until virtual time advances, then resumes consistently.
items.cross_feature_contract: Runner wait, queue, status, logs, and history agree.

items.description: Recovery classifies partial event/log marker and preserves deterministic streams.
items.cross_feature_contract: Recovery and log/event projections agree after interrupted write.
items.feature_pure_notes: System: recovery marker lifecycle; public marker setup required.

items.description: max_active_runs prevents excess active runs while queue/history/next-runs remain coherent.
items.cross_feature_contract: Concurrency limit spans queue, active runs, and schedule projections.

items.description: Failed import into non-empty ledger leaves all existing reports byte-equivalent.
items.cross_feature_contract: Atomicity spans every public projection.
